title: Verify existing implementation of auth middleware for route protection
description: The JWT validation middleware for protecting routes is already implemented. Verified: (1) src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts provides createAuthMiddleware factory with Bearer token extraction, 401 responses, and user context attachment; (2) src/auth/withAuth.ts provides a composable HOC wrapper for route handlers; (3) src/auth/_auth.ts provides extractBearerToken utility; (4) src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts contains 8 passing tests covering token extraction, validation, expired/malformed tokens, and integration scenarios; (5) src/app/api/notes/route.ts demonstrates the withAuth pattern in use. All acceptance criteria met.
existing_patterns: src/auth/_auth.ts - extractBearerToken() extracts Bearer token from Authorization header
src/auth/_auth.ts - checkRole() implements RBAC with hierarchical role inheritance
src/auth/withAuth.ts - withAuth() HOC wraps Next.js route handlers with authentication
src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts - createAuthMiddleware() factory pattern for creating composable middleware
src/app/api/notes/route.ts - withAuth usage pattern with optional and roles-based access control
